target.title: [Repo Assist] test(connection): add ChatNavigationReadiness unit tests
target.body:
🤖 *This is an automated pull request from Repo Assist.*

## Summary

`ChatNavigationReadiness` has no existing tests despite containing meaningful guard logic that's used by chat and canvas UI surfaces. This PR adds 22 focused unit tests covering:

- **`IsOperatorHandshakeReady`**: null manager fast-path, Connected → true, all non-Connected states → false
- **`WaitForOperatorHandshakeAsync`**: null manager immediate return, already connected, state-change fires before timeout, timeout expiry (returns false), and cancellation (throws `OperationCanceledException`)

The tests reuse the `StubConnectionManager` pattern established in the connection test suite.

## Test Status

- ✅ `dotnet test OpenClaw.Connection.Tests --filter ChatNavigation` — 22 passed, 0 failures
- ✅ `dotnet test OpenClaw.Tray.Tests` — 932 passed, 2 skipped, 0 failures
